steps.title: Identify the claim to illustrate
steps.content: The underlined claim says the survey reveals strong support for building more high-speed rail lines in the United States. The quotation must express approval of HSR and support for expanding it in the United States.

steps.title: Reject neutral or opposing quotes
steps.content: Choice A favors buses over trains. Choice B only mentions past travel on HSR lines outside the United States. Choice D says the United States has enough HSR and should invest elsewhere. The quote that praises HSR and says the United States needs more lines illustrates the claim. The answer is C.
